_note: NEGATIVE pocket.bundle.v1 KAV — proves the semantic gate is NOT dead code hidden behind crypto. This bundle is CRYPTO-VALID (its ed25519 signature verifies under the SAME pinned public key as the positive KAV) but SEMANTICALLY-INVALID: its sequence range is INVERTED (sequenceStart 300 > sequenceEnd 200). Therefore verifiesSignature() is TRUE, isSemanticallyValid() is FALSE, and VerifiedBundle.verify() MUST return nil. Signed once in the same ephemeral keypair session as the positive KAV; the private key is not committed.

bundle.note: Identical to the positive KAV bundle EXCEPT sequenceStart=300 (inverted range) — the only change that makes it semantically invalid while staying crypto-valid.

kav.verifyResult: nil (rejected by the semantic gate despite a valid signature)
